
### Deactivate user

JWT is stateless — there are no stored tokens to revoke.
The is_active flag is checked on every request by the
EnsureUserIsActive middleware, so the user is effectively
locked out immediately.

#### Path Variables

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `user` | `integer` | Yes | The user ID | - |

### Responses

#### Response: `204` - No content
#### Response: `404` - NOT_FOUND Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "NOT_FOUND",
    "exception_type": "ModelNotFoundException",
    "message": "Resource not found."
}
```

#### Response: `401` - UNAUTHENTICATED Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "UNAUTHENTICATED",
    "exception_type": "AuthenticationException",
    "message": "Unauthenticated."
}
```

### Register user

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | `string` | Yes |  | Max Length: `255` |
| `email` | `string` | Yes |  | Max Length: `255` |
| `password` | `string` | Yes |  | - |
| `role` | `string` | Yes |  | Enum: `customer`, `seller` |
| `shop_name` | `string / null` | No | Seller-only fields | Max Length: `255` |
| `shop_description` | `string / null` | No |  | Max Length: `1000` |
| `password_confirmation` | `string` | Yes |  | - |

### Responses

#### Response: `201` - 
```json
{
    "message": "qui",
    "user": {
        "id": 66,
        "name": "sed eaque expedita",
        "email": null,
        "email_verified_at": "1976-02-01T12:31:23+00:00",
        "role": "et",
        "is_active": true,
        "created_at": "2017-02-05T15:22:00+00:00",
        "updated_at": "2018-06-04T07:00:05+00:00"
    },
    "authorization": {
        "access_token": [],
        "token_type": "sed",
        "expires_in": "facere"
    }
}
```

#### Response: `500` - INTERNAL_ERROR Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "INTERNAL_ERROR",
    "exception_type": "ValidationException",
    "message": "Server Error"
}
```

    "password_confirmation": "+Ov'*O^x"
}

request.description:
### Login user

#### Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description | Constraints |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `email` | `string` | Yes |  | - |
| `password` | `string` | Yes |  | - |

### Responses

#### Response: `200` - 
```json
{
    "message": "aut",
    "user": "cum",
    "authorization": {
        "access_token": true,
        "token_type": "reiciendis",
        "expires_in": "corrupti"
    }
}
```

#### Response: `401` - Invalid Credentials Exception Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "INVALID_CREDENTIALS",
    "exception_type": "InvalidCredentialsException",
    "message": "This action cannot be completed."
}
```

#### Response: `403` - Account Deactivated Exception Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "ACCOUNT_DEACTIVATED",
    "exception_type": "AccountDeactivatedException",
    "message": "This action cannot be completed."
}
```

#### Response: `500` - INTERNAL_ERROR Error
```json
{
    "error_code": "INTERNAL_ERROR",
    "exception_type": "ValidationException",
    "message": "Server Error"
}
```
